name: medication-timeline
title: Medication Timeline
description: Doses over time on a shared time axis — given, scheduled, held, missed, and refused, each as visible as the others.

props.name: times
props.description: The shared time axis. Pass the same labels a vitals chart uses and the two align.

props.name: medications
props.description: `{ key, label, doses }` where a dose is `{ time, state, detail? }`.

clinicalNotes: Held, missed, and refused doses are rendered as prominently as given ones, and each state carries a glyph as well as a colour. A strip that showed only what was administered would answer "what did we give?" while hiding the question a clinician is usually asking — "why is she still tachycardic?" — when the answer is that three beta-blocker doses were held for a soft blood pressure. Alignment is not causation: placing this above a vitals trend invites the eye to connect a dose with a change, and the component makes the timing visible while making no claim about the link. It is a record view, not an administration record — it cannot sign for a dose.
notes: Built from primitives on a categorical time axis so it aligns with vitals-trend-chart. Composes badge + tooltip.
